info.description: Workspace ONE UEM MDM REST API V4
info.title: MDM API V4

get.description:
Returns the full profile details, including all payloads associated with the profile.
The only payloads supported by this API are the Linux Wi-Fi, Credentials, and Custom Configuration payloads.
get.summary: New - Retrive profile details from Profile Id.
